arts.sum: Elversberg were in dreamland heading into the second half against FC Heidenheim on Thursday after early goals from regular attacking threats Lukas Petkov and Fisnik Asllani earned them a 2-0 away lead...

arts.ttl: Preview: Elversberg vs. Heidenheim - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Bundesliga Relegation Playoffs clash between Elversberg and Heidenheim, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
